Lukáš Joukl
• 3.+
Recruitment & Employer branding specialist
Zadavatel pracovní nabídky
Poslat zprávu
O pracovní příležitosti
Staňte se součástí české farmaceutické společnosti s globálním dosahem.
V PRO.MED.CS vyvíjíme, vyrábíme a dodáváme léčivé přípravky, které pomáhají pacientům ve více než 30 zemích světa. Data jsou jedním z klíčových pilířů našeho dalšího rozvoje, a proto budujeme moderní integrační platformu postavenou na Microsoft Fabric.
Do našeho ICT týmu hledáme nového kolegu nebo kolegyni na nově vytvořenou pozici Data Integration Engineer, který bude stát u zrodu firemní integrační architektury a propojí klíčové systémy napříč společností. Pokud Vás baví datové integrace, moderní cloudové technologie a chcete mít možnost ovlivnit způsob práce s daty v celé firmě, rádi Vás poznáme.
Co Vás na pozici čeká?
podílet se na návrhu a budování celofiremní integrační platformy postavené na Microsoft Fabric
vyvíjet a spravovat datové pipeline (ETL/ELT) mezi klíčovými aplikacemi a databázemi
pracovat s Microsoft Fabric (Data Factory, Lakehouse, Synapse, OneLake)
implementovat API konektory a integrační scénáře (REST, JSON, XML, SAP)
navrhovat datové struktury, mapování dat a jejich transformaci do business logiky
zajišťovat kvalitu, konzistenci a bezpečnost přenášených dat
monitorovat integrační procesy, řešit provozní události a optimalizovat výkon integrační platformy
spolupracovat s databázovým administrátorem, aplikačními týmy i business uživateli na rozvoji datové architektury
podílet se na automatizaci prostředí (Git, CI/CD) a přípravě integrační vrstvy pro budoucí reporting a analytiku
Jak si Vás představujeme?
máte zkušenosti s datovými integracemi nebo vývojem integračních řešení
velmi dobře ovládáte SQL a rozumíte datovému modelování
máte zkušenosti s ETL/ELT nástroji (např. SSIS, Azure Data Factory nebo Microsoft Fabric Data Factory)
orientujete se v integraci systémů prostřednictvím API (REST, JSON, XML, případně SAP)
výhodou je zkušenost s Microsoft Fabric nebo Azure službami
základní znalost Git, CI/CD nebo DevOps principů je pro Vás výhodou
dokážete komunikovat s technickými i business kolegy a hledat efektivní řešení
pracujete samostatně, systematicky a máte chuť podílet se na budování nového prostředí
angličtinu využijete při práci s dokumentací i při komunikaci s dodavateli
Co Vám nabízíme?
možnost podílet se na budování nové datové integrační platformy společnosti
práci s moderními technologiemi Microsoft Fabric a Azure
možnost ovlivnit architekturu datových integrací napříč firmou
stabilní zázemí české farmaceutické společnosti s mezinárodním přesahem
motivující finanční ohodnocení
flexibilní pracovní dobu a možnost práce z domova
25 dní dovolené
příspěvek na stravování, dopravu a penzijní připojištění
příspěvek na jazykové vzdělávání
Multisport kartu za zvýhodněnou cenu
odborné vzdělávání a možnost dalšího profesního rozvoje
Místo výkonu práce: Praha 4 – Brumlovka s možností homeoffice
Nástup: dle dohody
Zaujala Vás pozice? Pošlete nám svůj životopis – rádi se s Vámi potkáme.

entries.title: Knowledge Graph Engineer
entries.raw_text:
IDC
Knowledge Graph Engineer
Praha, Hlavní město Praha, Česko · před 3 dny · 13 lidí kliklo na tlačítko Zažádat
Propagováno zaměstnavatelem · Odpovědi spravované mimo LinkedIn
Plný úvazek
Podat žádost
Uloženo
Podívejte se, jak si vedete v porovnání s 13 dalšími, kteří se o pozici ucházejí
Získejte přístup k exkluzivním informacím o uchazečích, podívejte se na pracovní místa, kde máte největší šanci se odpověď, a mnoho dalšího.
Vyzkoušejte Premium za 0 Kč
Lidé, které můžete oslovit
Martin Belas
• 3.+
Freelance Full-Stack Developer - Open from October for a new and interesting Java project to create value and grow with new technologies.
Absolvent školy z Ostravská univerzita
Navázat spojení
O pracovní příležitosti
About The Role & Team
At IDC, we are at the forefront of technological innovation, providing critical insights and market intelligence to businesses worldwide. Are you interested in building industry-leading artificial Intelligence solutions that drive speed, agility, and differentiation for our business? As a Knowledge Graph Engineer – Supplier Products, you will help us turn our vast repository of data into usable product information leveraging solutions that include matching techniques, machine learning, graph theory, and large language models. This role will have sophisticated analytical expertise; business acumen; a strategic mindset; client relationship skills, problem solving; and a passion for generating business impact.
What You’ll Do
Dive deep into complex data sets, extracting meaningful insights using statistical analysis and machine learning techniques.
Own the process of gathering, extracting, and compiling data across sources via relevant tools (e.g., SQL, R, Python). Format, re-structure, and validate data to ensure quality.
The ability to identify opportunities to use AI to transform business and operational processes for creating new sources of revenue.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand business goals and translate them into actionable data-driven recommendations.
Create and fine-tune machine learning algorithms to solve intricate business problems.
Design and maintain Knowledge Graph solutions, graph analytics, entity resolution, and semantic search capabilities.
Leverage ML and AI models (both custom and pre-built) to build predictive systems that enhance decision-making processes.
Explore generative AI models to generate synthetic data or create novel solutions.
Clean, preprocess, and transform data to improve model performance.
Present findings and insights through compelling data visualizations.
Work closely with product development teams, data engineers, AI engineers and business leaders to integrate data science solutions into our products and services.
Stay abreast of the latest advancements in ML, AI, and generative models, contributing to our continuous innovation.
What You Bring
Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Statistics, Mathematics, Data Science, Engineering, Physics, Economics, or a related quantitative field.
3+ years of work experience using analytics to solve product or business problems, applying machine learning algorithms, performing statistical analysis, and coding (e.g., Python, R, SQL) (or 7+ years of work experience with a master’s degree).
5+ years of data-science experience managing structured and unstructured data, applying statistical techniques and reporting results.
Experience with Knowledge Graphs, graph databases, or graph analytics concepts.
Proficiency in programming languages such as Python, NLTK, R, and SQL.
Strong analytical skills and experience with data manipulation libraries (e.g., Pandas, NumPy).
Proficiency in Graph databases such as Neo4J
Familiarity with machine learning frameworks (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) and generative AI models (e.g., Azure OpenAI, Google Gemini, and Amazon Bedrock).
Excellent problem-solving abilities, communication, and collaboration skills.
AWS Machine Learning – Specialty or Azure Data Scientist Associate or other certifications is preferred.
Why This Role Stands Out
At IDC, your work helps shape how the world understands technology and where it goes next. You collaborate with curious, high-caliber colleagues who value rigor, integrity, and shared success. As the premier global provider of trusted technology intelligence, IDC equips business and technology leaders with the evidence they need to make confident decisions. Our insights inform strategy, investment, and innovation across industries and regions.
Recognized by IIAR as Analyst Firm of the Year for five consecutive years, IDC sets the standard for credibility and impact. With more than 1,000 analysts worldwide and a truly global perspective, we combine deep expertise with practical relevance. Here, your ideas matter, your voice is heard, and your contributions provide the insights leaders rely on every day. It is meaningful work, backed by a culture that supports growth, collaboration, and long-term career development with a globally respected brand.
What We Offer
5 weeks of holidays + global shut down 19 Agu & 24 Dec - 3 Jan
Full time, permanent position offered in hybrid model (2-3 days from office) or remote module
Flexibility to work from home most of the week
Sick days
Certain flexibility to schedule your working hours
Cafeteria system (use points on Flexipasses, pension/life insurance, or Multisport card)
Meal allowance
Equal Opportunity Employer
IDC is committed to providing equal employment opportunities for all qualified persons. Employment eligibility verification required. We participate in E-Verify.

IDC is the premier global provider of market intelligence, advisory services, and events for the information technology, telecommunications, and consumer technology markets. IDC helps IT professionals, business executives, and the investment community make fact-based decisions on technology purchases and business strategy. More than 1,300 IDC analysts provide global, regional, and local expertise on technology and industry opportunities and trends in over 110 countries worldwide. For more than 50 years IDC has provided strategic insights to help our clients achieve their key business objectives. IDC’s Insights businesses provide industry-focused advice for IT buyers in the Financial, Government, Health, Retail, Manufacturing and Energy verticals. To learn more about IDC, please visit www.idc.com. Follow IDC on Twitter at @IDC and LinkedIn. Subscribe to the IDC Blog for industry news and insights.

• 3.+
Senior People Specialist at Resistant AI
Zadavatel pracovní nabídky
Poslat zprávu
O pracovní příležitosti
Are you passionate about designing products people genuinely enjoy using?
Do you love understanding customer behaviour, running usability studies, and transforming complex workflows into intuitive experiences?
If so, we'd love to hear from you
Let's find out more! 👇
We are Resistant AI, a fast-moving startup where things happen quickly, and decisions are made just as fast. We believe in taking initiative – better to ask forgiveness than permission – but don't worry, we keep it organized and collaborative. If you love the thrill of building and iterating, you'll fit right in! 👌
And what do we actually do?
We protect the AI and automation systems of modern financial services from manipulation and attack. We do so by forensically analyzing everything from the documents submitted by customers to the ongoing behaviors they exhibit while using the service to uncover and prevent serial fraud, synthetic identities, account takeovers, money laundering and as yet unknown financial threats operating at scale.
This is our founding team's second startup, and we recently closed our Series B investment round led by Google Ventures, Index Ventures and Credo Ventures.
🔎 Who are we looking for?
We are investing in Product Design and looking for a UX Designer / Researcher to join our Prague team.
This role combines UX design with product research. You'll work closely with customers, Product Managers, Customer Engineers and Engineering to understand customer needs, validate ideas before development begins, and ensure every product decision is grounded in evidence.
💪 What you'll do?
Conduct customer interviews and discovery sessions
Plan and facilitate usability testing
Design user journeys, wireframes, prototypes and interfaces
Own and evolve our design system
Partner with Product Managers to validate hypotheses
Collaborate with engineers throughout implementation
Analyse customer behaviour and identify UX opportunities
Improve both customer-facing products and internal tools
Present research findings and recommendations
Champion user-centred design
🙌 What do you bring?
3+ years of experience in UX, Product Design or UX Research
Strong proficiency with Figma
Experience conducting interviews and usability testing
Portfolio demonstrating end-to-end product design work
Excellent communication and workshop facilitation skills
Ability to balance research with pragmatic delivery
Enterprise SaaS experience is an advantage
Fluent English (C1 level)
💙 What do we offer?
A unique opportunity to establish UX research and product design as a core capability at Resistant AI
The opportunity to work with some of the world's leading financial institutions and fintech companies
Working alongside some of the top professionals in AI, fraud detection, cybersecurity, and machine learning
A culture that values individual intellect as much as teamwork
A rapidly growing company where your work has direct customer impact
Flexible working hours and home office
Modern offices in the center of Prague
Free lunches when you're in the office
Stock options program
Multisport card
5 weeks of vacation + sick days
Team events and sports activities on a regular basis
… více

Tomas Novotny
• 3.+
Project Manager at Thermo Fisher Scientific
Absolvent školy z Ostravská univerzita
Navázat spojení
O pracovní příležitosti
Work Schedule
Standard (Mon-Fri)
Environmental Conditions
Office
As part of the Thermo Fisher Scientific team, you’ll discover meaningful work that makes a positive impact on a global scale. Join our colleagues in bringing our Mission to life every single day to enable our customers to make the world healthier, cleaner and safer. We provide our global teams with the resources needed to achieve individual career goals while helping to take science a step beyond by developing solutions for some of the world’s toughest challenges, like protecting the environment, making sure our food is safe or helping find cures for cancer.
DESCRIPTION:
Join our innovative R&D team, where you'll contribute to developing next-generation electron microscopy and analytical instruments that enable groundbreaking scientific discoveries. As a Systems Design Engineer III, you'll collaborate with multidisciplinary teams to create sophisticated solutions that help make the world healthier, cleaner, and safer. Work with advanced technologies including electron optics, high-precision mechanics, advanced software, and automated systems while driving innovation in fields ranging from semiconductor manufacturing to life sciences research.
REQUIREMENTS:
Advanced Degree plus 3 years of experience, or Bachelor's Degree plus 5 years of experience developing complex technical systems, preferably in electron microscopy or semiconductor equipment
Preferred Fields of Study: Physics, Mechanical, Electrical, Systems Engineering or related technical field
Additional specialized certifications in relevant areas (e.g., Six Sigma) beneficial
Demonstrated expertise in systems engineering principles including requirements management, architecture development, and integration
Strong analytical and problem-solving capabilities with experience using statistical methods and DOE
Proficient in relevant software tools (e.g., Python, MATLAB, CAD)
Experience with some combination of: electron optics, high voltage systems, vacuum technology, precision mechanics, motion control, or automation
Experience guiding technical projects and supporting team members
Strong documentation and technical writing skills
Excellence in cross-functional collaboration and communication
Ability to travel up to 10-20% as needed
Proficient English language skills required
Experience with regulated environments (FDA, ISO) and quality systems preferred
Demonstrated innovation and problem solving ability
Project management capabilities and experience leading development programs
Strong focus on product quality, reliability and customer needs

About Thermo Fisher Scientific
Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. is the world leader in serving science, with annual revenue of approximately $40 billion. Our Mission is to enable our customers to make the world healthier, cleaner and safer. Whether our customers are accelerating life sciences research, solving complex analytical challenges, increasing productivity in their laboratories, improving patient health through diagnostics or the development and manufacture of life-changing therapies, we are here to support them. Our global team delivers an unrivaled combination of innovative technologies, purchasing convenience and pharmaceutical services through our industry-leading brands, including Thermo Scientific, Applied Biosystems, Invitrogen, Fisher Scientific, Unity Lab Services, Patheon and PPD.
For more information, please visit www.thermofisher.com.
… více
Závazky
Diverzita, rovnost a inkluze
At Thermo Fisher Scientific, we strive for an inclusive, global environment that values the power of diverse talent, backgrounds and experiences, allowing us to foster an atmosphere where everyone feels like they belong and can thrive. When we treat each other with respect and support and work together in the spirit of our 4i Values of integrity, involvement, innovation, and intensity, we can make a difference in the world – resulting in successful outcomes for all.​
Our D&I strategy is embedded in every stage of our colleague experience – from recruiting and hiring to training, development and long-term career planning. Our growing cross- divisional team helps to activate our D&I strategy and goals throughout each of our businesses and corporate functions.
… více
Kariérní růst a vzdělávání
At Thermo Fisher Scientific, our work has a purpose. Our work requires passion and creates meaningful outcomes. We do our best to create a positive, fair and safe working environment for our colleagues around the globe.
… více
Udržitelný rozvoj životního prostředí
At Thermo Fisher, our commitment to operating with integrity has long included a focus on environmental stewardship. We believe we have a responsibility to actively reduce our impact on the planet while continually seeking new ways to facilitate and accelerate discovery for our customers.​
​
We recognize the inextricable link between a healthy planet and healthy people. In order to provide long-term value in a world with natural resources that are increasingly constrained, we leverage our culture of continuous improvement, integrate the rising expectations of our stakeholders, and pursue new opportunities to strengthen and accelerate our progress. While working to reduce our impact on the planet, we are also actively supporting the sustainability ambitions of our customers with a focus on:​
|  Climate​
|  Product design​
|  Water​
|  Waste.
… více
Sociální dopad
We believe that to be a good corporate citizen we must invest in the communities where our employees live and work. Our approach to community impact supports our culture of developing a talented, collaborative and passionate global team while supporting causes that our colleagues care about around the world. Our colleagues connect with local communities to identify philanthropic opportunities through our employee-led Community Action Councils (CACs). We further empower our employees to support organizations they care about through in-kind donations and our matching gifts program.​
​
We also believe that opportunities to work with students are an opportunity to inspire our next generation of scientists and engineers. Our partnerships with non-profits promote STEM and provide employees with additional volunteer opportunities.
… více
Rovnováha mezi pracovním a osobním životem
At Thermo Fisher, we believe in the importance of empowering colleagues to take control of all aspects of their wellbeing – emotional, physical, social and financial. Wellbeing impacts the lives of our colleagues in countless ways every day – from how we take care of ourselves and our families physically, to emotional health and personal financial matters, to how we balance our personal and professional lives. ​
​
Our total rewards are designed to recognize outstanding performance and meet the diverse needs of all our colleagues – at every stage of their personal and professional lives. We regularly evaluate and measure our program against established benchmarks to ensure we are delivering the right mix of services and resources, and that our participants are receiving a consistently great experience. ​

Your resume is more than a list of responsibilities. It’s an opportunity to show the impact you've made, the challenges you've solved, and what makes you unique as a professional.
In this edition of Science of Hiring, our recruiters share practical advice on how to bring more of your authentic self into your resume while keeping it clear, relevant, and focused on results.
#ScienceOfHiring #ThermoFisherCareers #LifeAtThermoFisher #ThermoFisherScientific
… více
Zobrazit překlad
​
​
​
Carlos Mata
• 3.+
Sr. Product Specialist - Microarrays
2 h •
El futuro de la Investigación Biomédica y la Medicina de Precisión es multi-ómico.
Con el lanzamiento del SwiftArrayStudio™️ Microarray Analyzer y los nuevos Axiom™️ SwiftArrayStudio™️ Arrays, Thermo Fisher Scientific fortalece su liderazgo en genómica de alta resolución, impulsando aplicaciones como GWAS, Polygenic Risk Scores (PRS), farmacogenómica, genotipado de alta densidad y medicina predictiva.
Ahora, con Olink®️ como parte de la familia de Thermo Fisher Scientific, los investigadores tienen acceso a dos plataformas altamente especializadas y complementarias: una enfocada en genómica y otra en proteómica basada en la tecnología Proximity Extension Assay (PEA). Aunque cada una ofrece un enorme valor por sí sola, su verdadera fortaleza emerge cuando se integran en una estrategia multi-ómica, permitiendo conectar la variación genética con la expresión proteica para comprender mejor los mecanismos biológicos y acelerar el descubrimiento científico.
Genotipo → Proteínas → Fenotipo
Esta aproximación multi-ómica abre nuevas oportunidades para:
🧬 Descubrimiento de biomarcadores.
🩺 Medicina de precisión.
💊 Desarrollo de terapias.
🔬 Investigación traslacional.
🌍 Estudios poblacionales y biobancos.
Cada variante genética cuenta una parte de la historia. La proteómica revela cómo esa historia se expresa biológicamente. Juntas, ambas plataformas ofrecen una visión mucho más completa de la biología humana y del desarrollo de enfermedades, acercándonos a una medicina verdaderamente predictiva y personalizada.
#ThermoFisherScientific #Olink #Multiomics #Genomics #Proteomics #PrecisionMedicine #GWAS #PRS #PolygenicRiskScore #Pharmacogenomics #Biomarkers #TranslationalResearch #LifeSciences #LATAM

Unfortunately, recruitment scams continue to target job seekers. If you're applying for a role at Thermo Fisher Scientific, remember that we will never ask you to pay a fee, provide banking information, or share sensitive personal details during the hiring process.
Knowing the warning signs can help protect you and those around you. Learn how to identify fraudulent recruiting activity, safeguard your information, and report suspicious messages here: https://bit.ly/4poio69

O pracovní příležitosti
Baví vás být u vzniku nových produktů od prvního zadání zákazníka až po sériovou výrobu?
Hledáme technicky zaměřeného profesionála, který se stane klíčovým článkem mezi zákazníkem, vývojovým týmem a výrobními závody. Budete řídit vývoj produktu od prvotního konceptu přes prototypovou fázi až po úspěšné zavedení do sériové výroby
.Pokud dokážete propojit technické myšlení, projektové řízení a špičkovou komunikaci, může být tato role právě pro vás
.
Co bude vaším úkole
m:přebírat technické požadavky zákazníků a převádět je do konkrétních řeše
níkoordinovat spolupráci mezi konstrukcí, designem, kvalitou, materiálovým oddělením, výrobou a dalšími tý

Aktualně obsazujeme pozici System Integrator v oblasti ADAS / Automotive
Tvoje zodpovědnost:
budes zodpovedny za cely toolchain
systémové inženýrstvi na pomezí HW a SW
definice a správa systémových požadavků pro automotive ECU
práce s komunikačními protokoly (CAN, Automotive Ethernet, SPI, I2C, UART)
integrace a testování ve vozidel

Fondée en 2008, T&S est une entreprise spécialisée dans l'ingénierie, le digital et le conseil. Partenaire de confiance de ses clients dans le développement de projets innovants, elle s'appuie également sur un bureau d'études interne pour répondre aux exigences du marché et suivre les tendances du secteur.
Placer l'humain au cœur de sa stratégie et animée par une culture d'excellence, l'entreprise met son expertise au service de ses partenaires dans un esprit de transparence et d'engagement. Au fil des ans, elle a noué des relations durables avec des acteurs majeurs des secteurs industriel, automobile et financier.
Forte d’un héritage franco-allemand et d’une présence internationale, T&S emploie aujourd’hui plus de 3 000 personnes dans 10 pays. Son modèle entrepreneurial favorise l’innovation, les relations étroites avec les clients et le développement des talents dans un environnement multiculturel.
… více
Závazky
Diverzita, rovnost a inkluze
As a responsible employer, T&S promotes diversity, inclusion, and equality in the workplace through its inclusion and equal opportunity policy.
To support this initiative, we are signatories to the Diversity Charter in France, and have made commitments and adopted action plans to promote diversity and equal opportunity. For example, 100% of our managers and HR staff have completed a “Non-Discriminatory Hiring” training course.
… více
Rovnováha mezi pracovním a osobním životem
Quality of Life at Work Well-being at work is a fundamental pillar of our CSR policy. T&S takes steps to ensure a work-life balance that suits each individual.
Regular monitoring of well-being indicators allows us to measure the progress and impact of the initiatives implemented within the company:
Working conditions:
- Tailored support for each employee provided by an HR consultant and a manager.
- Quality of workspaces and equipment
- Work-life balance: the right to disconnect and flexible work arrangements through remote work whenever possible.
… více
Udržitelný rozvoj životního prostředí
T&S is committed to reducing its environmental footprint through the implementation of a robust environmental policy.
We support environmentally responsible growth and aim to reduce our CO2 emissions in accordance with scientific recommendations based on our annual carbon footprint assessment.
To ensure transparent communication about our environmental impact, T&S also participates annually in the Carbon Disclosure Project.
In May 2023, the T&S Group committed to setting science-based short-term emissions reduction targets in accordance with the SBTI’s criteria and recommendations, and to submitting them to the SBTI for validation starting in 2025.
The Science-Based Targets initiative promotes numerous actions aimed at improving the global response to climate change by providing companies with science-based criteria to help them reduce excessive emissions.
… více
Více informací
Chcete s námi v budoucnu pracovat?
Členové, kteří sdílí, že mají o společnost zájem, mají 2× vyšší šanci, že dostanou zprávu od náboráře, než ti, kteří svůj zájem nesdílí. Více informací
